title: sticherus owhyhensis
intro: Sticherus owhyhensis, also known as the 'Fan Fern', is a species of plant in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, including Hawaii and the Cook Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for its health benefits.
